title: Warn when active claims have overlapping file hints
description: Add conservative warnings for likely collisions between active claims. Compare task path_hints and any known changed files from handoffs/claims so agents get early notice when parallel work may touch the same files or directories.
acceptance: A shared core helper finds likely overlaps between active claims using task path_hints and available changed_files metadata.
Briefs warn about active claims in the same scope and overlapping file hints or changed files.
Generated status or active-work context includes concise overlap warnings for humans.
Validation emits warnings, not errors, for likely overlap and includes the involved task/claim ids.
Warnings explain that path-hint overlap is advisory and may be a false positive.
Tests cover exact file overlap, directory-prefix overlap, same-scope warning, and no-overlap cases.
bun test, typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate are clean.
notes: Spec §12 says briefs should warn about same-scope active claims and overlapping file hints or changed files. Keep it conservative; do not block claims.
